data.title: Bybit introduces yield-bearing tokenized gold linked to XAUT, turning gold into an income-generating asset.
data.description: The cryptocurrency exchange is introducing a new yield product linked to Tether Gold (XAUT), indicating a move towards transforming typically inactive assets such as gold into sources of income.

data.title: Flex LNG - Notice of Annual General Meeting 2026
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on March 20, 2026, FLEX LNG Ltd. (NYSE: FLNG) announced its forthcoming 2026 Annual General Meeting, scheduled for May 5, 2026. Shareholders eligible to vote at the AGM should note the record date set for March 24, 2026. Further details can be obtained by requesting a copy of the relevant documents.
IEA report: People should be encouraged to use public transport in response to current energy market situation
IEA Urges Work-From-Home Measures as a Way to Mitigate Oil Price Pressure on Consumers
IEA Report Details Strategies to Reduce Consumer Oil Price Burden Following Middle East Supply Shocks
The International Energy Agency proposes cutting highway speed limits by at least 10 km/h as part of its recommendations.
The International Energy Agency suggests minimizing air travel where possible and choosing alternative modes of transport due to current energy pressures.
The International Energy Agency suggests diverting the use of liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) away from transport applications.
According to the International Energy Agency, promoting public transport usage is recommended amid ongoing energy market pressures.

data.title: FedEx, Planet Labs And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Friday
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures are trading higher, potentially drawing investor attention to specific stocks today. Xpeng Inc. (NYSE: XPEV) is expected to announce its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens, with shares rising 0.4% to $19.23 in after-hours trading. Planet Labs PBC (NYSE: PL) reported stronger-than-expected fourth-quarter sales and provided FY27 guidance surpassing estimates, leading to a 14.6% surge in shares to $30.90 during after-hours trading. FedEx Corp. also remains in focus. Full details are available on a financial news website.

data.title: Why Torrid Holdings (CURV) Stock Surged 20% After Hours
data.description: Shares of Torrid Holdings Inc. (NYSE: CURV) surged by 20% in after-hours trading on Thursday, reaching $1.50. The California-based retailer specializing in plus-size clothing released its fourth-quarter and fiscal 2025 results for the period ending Jan. 31. The full-year adjusted EBITDA for Torrid Holdings surpassed expectations, coming in at $63.6 million, with net sales reaching $1.0 billion. However, the company reported a net loss of $7 million compared to a net income of $16.3 million the previous year. Total liquidity was noted at $84.9 million. CEO Lisa Harper described 2025 as a "transformational year" and indicated positive first-quarter trends. In the fourth quarter, net sales declined by 14.3% to $236.2 million.

data.title: Arcfra AECP 6.3 Breaks the 11M IOPS Barrier, Delivering Tier-1 All-Flash Performance and RPO=0 Resilience for Enterprise Cloud
data.description: Today, in Singapore on March 20, 2026, Arcfra, an innovator in high-performance cloud and AI technology, unveiled the launch of Arcfra Enterprise Cloud Platform (AECP) 6.3. Fueled by the cutting-edge Arcfra Cloud Operating System (ACOS 6.3), this upgrade brings a significant increase of 4.6 times in performance compared to the previous version.

data.title: Decoding TOPCon: A JA Solar-University of New South Wales Dialogue on the Future of PV
data.description: In March 20, 2026, the global photovoltaic (PV) industry is facing challenges such as cost constraints, policy changes, and rapid technological advancements. TOPCon technology has become integral in current solar manufacturing practices, representing the majority of new module production on a global scale. This technology is instrumental in driving efficiency and innovation within the industry, with a significant impact on deployment worldwide.
